headline: OpenAI's $600 Billion Question Spoils the Party But Wednesday Is What Really Matters
summary: The company that convinced the world to bet hundreds of billions on AI infrastructure has reportedly missed its own growth targets. If that doesn't make you sit up straight, I don't know what will.
